name: Santa Laurensia School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Alam Sutera: Jl. Alam Sutera Boulevard, Tangerang; Suvarna Sutera: Jl. Suvarna Sutera Boulevard, Cikupa, Tangerang

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Santa Laurensia is one of the best-value options in Greater Jakarta for families who want internationally recognised qualifications.
paragraphs: Parents say Santa Laurensia is one of the best-value options in Greater Jakarta for families who want internationally recognised qualifications.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.1K – US$5.9K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Two campuses, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Libraries, Sports facilities.
